subject: A massive crab-like creature with a skull for a body squeezes through an ornate doorway, its claws and fleshy tendrils spread across the threshold
description: A grotesque crustacean creature fills the frame, its carapace formed entirely from a skull — hollow eye sockets, exposed teeth, and cracked bone surface all visible in deep crimson tones. Multiple hooked claws and fleshy, dripping appendages radiate outward as it pushes through an ornate stone doorway. The lower body and claws are a saturated red-pink, while a blue-green darkness peeks through the top of the door frame behind it, suggesting the creature has emerged from somewhere else entirely. The stone doorway molding frames it like a grotesque portrait. The texture is wet and fleshy, emphasizing a biological horror aesthetic.
foreground: fleshy crimson claws and dripping tendrils
background: ornate stone doorway, blue-green darkness beyond
